claim_under_attack: The current evidence base is insufficient to justify a build commitment, scoring 1/5 on evidence strength against a minimum Go threshold of 3/5.
evidence_or_reason: The artifact gives no source-backed rubric for why current evidence is exactly 1/5 or why 3/5 is the minimum Go threshold. Those numbers are asserted, not derived from the case packet, cited evidence, or a defined scoring method, so the claim looks precise without visible support.
